scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run build:electron
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron .
scripts.package:mac:dir: npm run build:desktop && npm run electron:install-app-deps && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac --dir
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:desktop && npm run electron:install-app-deps && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg --universal
scripts.dist:mac:release: npm run build:desktop && npm run electron:install-app-deps && KEEL_FORCE_CODE_SIGNING=1 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg --universal
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build:desktop && npm run electron:install-app-deps && KEEL_MAC_SPLIT=1 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build:desktop && npm run electron:install-app-deps && KEEL_MAC_SPLIT=1 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg --x64
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
